title: Council Tax band challenge form
body: "Before you challenge  You must be able to prove that you:   are the owner or occupier of the property have permission to represent the owner or occupier    If you are submitting the challenge on behalf of someone else, you must also fill in an authority to act form and send both forms to the Valuation Office Agency (VOA) together. If you do not send both forms together, your challenge may be marked as invalid.   You can also submit a Council Tax band challenge online, unless you are submitting a challenge on behalf of someone else.  If you want to add a property to the Council Tax valuation list, contact your local council.  Find out what evidence to submit when you:   have a legal right to make a challenge do not have a legal right to make a challenge want to delete a property from the Council Tax list    How to fill in the forms  You can either:   download the relevant form and fill it in on-screen print the form and fill it in by hand   The form may not work if you try to open it in your internet browser. To open the form you need to:    Download and save the form on your computer.   Open it using the latest free version of Adobe Reader.    Properties in England             Council Tax proposal form for properties in England    PDF, 322 KB, 3 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email different.format@hmrc.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.                 Council Tax proposal form for houses in multiple occupation (HMO)     PDF, 281 KB, 3 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email different.format@hmrc.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Properties in Wales             Council Tax proposal form for properties in Wales    PDF, 323 KB, 3 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email different.format@hmrc.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Where to send the form   Attach the completed form to an email. Send it to ctinbox@voa.gov.uk.  If you prefer, you can send the completed form by post to:   Valuation OfficerWycliffe House Green Lane Durham DH1 3UW   "
